arts.ttl: Bristol City predicted team vs Millwall as Manning's Reds look to end nine-game winless away run
arts.sum: Liam Manning's side will have enjoyed the rare break in their fixture schedule given the sheer amount of football they've played since the festive period, but that free weekend would have been made even sweeter by their win over Middlesbrough last time out . Cam Pring is again fit and available having returned from the bench against Middlesbrough last time out while both Haydon Roberts and Elijah Morrison are also candidates to start on that flank.

arts.ttl: Six Premier League clubs eyeing new Millwall star
arts.sum: Millwall attacking midfielder Ra’ees Bangura-Williams is being tracked by as many as six Premier League clubs, according to… The post Six Premier League clubs eyeing new Millwall star appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Millwall condemn abuse aimed at Liam Roberts following Jean-Philippe Mateta collision
arts.sum: The Championship club claim that reports from ‘news organisations’ and ‘high-profile figures’ fuelled the abuse

arts.ttl: Millwall release angry statement on Liam Roberts abuse after Jean-Philippe Mateta horror tackle
arts.sum: Millwall have angrily blasted the criticism being aimed at Liam Roberts following his horror tackle on Jean-Philippe Mateta in Saturday's FA Cup clash with Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Millwall release angry statement on Liam Roberts abuse after Jean-Philippe Mateta horror tackle
arts.sum: Millwall have angrily blasted the criticism being aimed at Liam Roberts following his horror tackle on Jean-Philippe Mateta in Saturday's FA Cup clash with Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Millwall deplore Roberts abuse after Mateta incident
arts.sum: Millwall have condemned "disgusting" abuse aimed at goalkeeper Liam Roberts after his red card for a head high tackle on Crystal Palace's Jean-Philippe Mateta.

arts.ttl: Chris Hogg details next challenge for George Earthy ahead of Bristol City's trip to Millwall
arts.sum: Chris Hogg has challenged George Earthy to "keep trying to make an impact" ahead of Bristol City's trip to Millwall after the West Ham United loanee opened his Robins' account against Middlesbrough last time out. Manning had stated in January that Earthy needed to add some goals and assists to his game to kickstart his time as a Bristol City player.

arts.ttl: Millwall decry ‘character assassination’ of Roberts after challenge on Mateta
arts.sum: Goalkeeper sent off for head-high tackle on forward FA may seek to have three-match ban extended Millwall have condemned the “character assassination” of Liam Roberts, as they await a possible extended ban for the goalkeeper’s challenge on Crystal Palace’s Jean-Philippe Mateta in their FA Cup tie on Saturday. The Championship club have pushed back against what they call “disgraceful suggestions” made against their keeper, after the high challenge that left Mateta with a head injury and led to Roberts being sent off five minutes into the game. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Millwall condemn Roberts abuse after Mateta incident
arts.sum: Millwall have condemned "disgusting" abuse aimed at goalkeeper Liam Roberts after his red card for a head high tackle on Crystal Palace's Jean-Philippe Mateta.

arts.ttl: Millwall man set to miss Bristol City clash after 'reckless' FA Cup red card vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Various pundits and supporters have been quick to slam Roberts for his challenge, but Crystal Palace chairman Steve Parish was quick to offer his verdict as he conducted an interview with the BBC at half-time where he suggested the Lions 'keeper had endangered Mateta. Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts is set to miss Bristol City's visit to The Den after being sent off in the Lions' defeat to Crystal Palace for a challange on Jean-Philippe Mateta that went viral across the football world.
